messageValues.message:
=You are an SEO backlink evaluator.

Relevant:
AI
SaaS
Automation
Software
Cloud
Mobile
Enterprise

Return ONLY JSON.

Format:

{
  "results":[
    [index,relevance_score,spam_score]
  ]
}

Example:

{
  "results":[
    [0,85,10],
    [1,40,50]
  ]
}

No explanations.
No text.

parameters.query:
SELECT
    cb.id AS competitor_backlinks_id,
    cb.competitor_id,

    c.company_name,

    cb.source_url,
    cb.anchor_text,
    cb.nofollow,

    bs.source_domain,
    bs.domain_rating

FROM competitor_backlinks cb

JOIN competitors c
    ON c.id = cb.competitor_id

JOIN backlink_sources bs
    ON bs.id = cb.backlink_source_id

WHERE
    cb.is_analyzed = false
    AND cb.last_seen_date::DATE = CURRENT_DATE

ORDER BY
    cb.created_at;

INSERT INTO error_logs(

agent_name,
workflow_name,
node_name,
error_type,
error_message,
input_data

)

VALUES(

'Agent 2',

'Agent 2 - Backlink Analyzer',

'if condition',

'Database Error',

'No backlink data ',

'{{ JSON.stringify($json).replace(/'/g,"''") }}'

);

INSERT INTO error_logs (

    workflow_name,
    agent_name,
    node_name,
    error_type,
    error_message,
    input_data

)

VALUES (

    'Agent 2 Backlink Analyzer',

    'Agent 2',

    'Basic LLM model',

    'LLM Error',

    '{{ $json.error }}',

    '{{ JSON.stringify($json).replace(/''/g,"''") }}'::jsonb

);

INSERT INTO error_logs (

    workflow_name,
    agent_name,
    node_name,
    error_type,
    error_message,
    input_data

)

VALUES (

    'Agent 2 Backlink Analyzer',

    'Agent 2',

    'Insert backlink_analysis',

    'Database Error',

    '{{ $json.error }}',

    '{{ JSON.stringify($json).replace(/''/g,"''") }}'::jsonb

);

WITH analysis_insert AS (

    INSERT INTO backlink_analysis (
        competitor_backlink_id,
        source_domain,
        domain_rating,
        relevance_score,
        authority_score,
        spam_score,
        opportunity_score,
        link_type,
        recommendation,
        analyzed_at
    )
    VALUES (
        '{{ $json.competitor_backlink_id }}',
        '{{ $json.source_domain }}',
        {{ $json.domain_rating }},
        {{ $json.relevance_score }},
        {{ $json.authority_score }},
        {{ $json.spam_score }},
        {{ $json.opportunity_score }},
        '{{ $json.link_type }}',
        '{{ $json.recommendation.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        '{{ $json.analyzed_at }}'
    )

    ON CONFLICT (competitor_backlink_id)
    DO UPDATE SET
        source_domain = EXCLUDED.source_domain,
        domain_rating = EXCLUDED.domain_rating,
        relevance_score = EXCLUDED.relevance_score,
        authority_score = EXCLUDED.authority_score,
        spam_score = EXCLUDED.spam_score,
        opportunity_score = EXCLUDED.opportunity_score,
        link_type = EXCLUDED.link_type,
        recommendation = EXCLUDED.recommendation,
        analyzed_at = EXCLUDED.analyzed_at

    RETURNING competitor_backlink_id
)

UPDATE competitor_backlinks
SET
    is_analyzed = true,
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id IN (
    SELECT competitor_backlink_id
    FROM analysis_insert
);

parameters.jsCode:
return {
  competitor_backlink_id: $json.competitor_backlinks_id,

  source_domain: $json.source_domain,
  domain_rating: $json.domain_rating,

  authority_score: $json.authority_score,

  relevance_score: $json.relevance_score,

  spam_score: $json.spam_score,

  opportunity_score: $json.opportunity_score,

  link_type: $json.link_type,

  relevance_reason: $json.relevance,

  recommendation: $json.recommendation,

  analyzed_at: new Date().toISOString()
};
